entities.name: Jasmine Technology Solution Public Company Limited

financial.note: Receives significant financial assistance and collateral support for debenture issuance from its parent company.
Provides credit facilities for ICT operations; sensitive to interest rate fluctuations affecting debt servicing costs.

supply_chain.note: Primary supplier of Antminer ASICs (S21/S19 series); Capex is highly sensitive to hardware pricing and global chip supply.
Bitcoin mining is energy-intensive; electricity costs (FT tariff) are the largest operational expense.
Collaboration on Generative AI (JAI brand) and Hyperscale Data Centers; drives the high-margin tech solution segment.
Strategic partner for developing the 'JAI' Thai LLM model, enhancing the ICT solution's competitive moat.

competitors.note: Direct rival in the Thai-listed Bitcoin mining space; competes for domestic investor capital in crypto-proxy stocks.
Competes as a digital asset investment play; sector rotation between pure miners and asset-holding firms.
Rival in the corporate ICT, Cloud, and Data Center segments in Thailand.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: The primary revenue driver for the digital asset segment; highly volatile and direct correlation with stock price.
Direct operational cost for mining rigs; rising power costs in Thailand compress mining gross profit margins.
As global hashrate rises, JTS's share of rewards decreases, necessitating constant hardware upgrades.
Revenue from Bitcoin is in USD, while costs are primarily in THB; THB depreciation yields translation gains.
